title: Truth Finish It Campaign
summary: The campaign that ended the teen smoking epidemic.

body.text: We partnered with The Truth Initiative to launch the Finish It campaign in August 2014 as a complete revolution of its long running truth anti tobacco efforts. Facing a new generation of youth and young adults who had grown less responsive to traditional industry manipulation messaging, the campaign shifted focus to empowerment and collective action. It targeted 15 to 21 year olds with the rallying cry to make their generation the one that finally ends smoking. Research showed this audience craved positive social change rather than protest, so Finish It positioned them as agents of progress. The campaign connected tobacco use to issues young people cared about such as relationships, social justice, money, and personal freedom while using a modern visual identity and digital first approach.
